/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_fapi_phy_message_adaptors.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_fapi_phy_message_adaptors.dir/csi_rs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_fapi_phy_message_adaptors.dir/pdcch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_fapi_phy_message_adaptors.dir/pdsch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_fapi_phy_message_adaptors.dir/prach.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_fapi_phy_message_adaptors.dir/prs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_fapi_phy_message_adaptors.dir/pucch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_fapi_phy_message_adaptors.dir/pusch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_fapi_phy_message_adaptors.dir/srs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_fapi_phy_message_adaptors.dir/ssb.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_fapi_phy_message_adaptors.a
